TCU_AIVC-Reg_v1.1

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference TCU_AIVC_Reg_v1.1_20220504T152759.json

Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 7CA
Receive ID 7DA
Functional Addr 77
Functional Name DCM Renault
